message:
test(ufunc): add column_stack large-U64 sidecar preservation test

Adds a targeted regression test confirming that column_stack correctly
preserves U64 values exceeding 2^53 (the exact-integer limit of f64)
through the integer sidecar pathway.  This closes the coverage gap for
column_stack alongside the recently hardened fftshift, ifftshift, and
where_select operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
